title: Method Acting
caption: When in Pass-a-Grille, you become the captain. It's law.

title: Almost a Grille Marks
caption: Tender moment, real couple, magnificent sunset — and a parking lot that absolutely refused to stay out of the shot.

title: Peak Vacation Mode
caption: Feet up, Gulf out. Scientists confirm: optimal configuration.

title: The Brass Monkey Crew
caption: A Busch Light, a dartboard, a basketball game nobody's watching. Grille Marks did not survive contact with this vibe.

title: The Cobblestones Did Not Miss
caption: String lights, white dress, cobblestone. She understood the assignment.

title: Mandatory Documentation
caption: You cannot come to the Brass Monkey without documentation. It is non-negotiable.

title: Golden Hour Energy
caption: Dusk patio. Good hair. No complaints.

title: Rustic Selfie Energy
caption: The beams said rustic. They said understood.
